description: Schema-driven corpus for api-security. No deterministic scanner covers BOLA/mass-assignment semantics, so the runner smoke-validates shape; the fixtures double as ground truth for the LLM eval harness (evals/).

fixtures.reason: object fetched by caller-supplied id with no ownership check (BOLA / CWE-639)

fixtures.text: app.get('/api/orders/:id', async (req, res) => { res.json(await Order.findOne({ _id: req.params.id, userId: req.user.id })); });
fixtures.reason: query scoped to the authenticated owner

fixtures.text: app.patch('/api/users/me', async (req, res) => { await User.updateOne({ _id: req.user.id }, { $set: req.body }); });
fixtures.reason: whole request body written to the model — role/isAdmin can be injected (CWE-915)

fixtures.text: app.patch('/api/users/me', async (req, res) => { const { displayName, avatarUrl } = req.body; await User.updateOne({ _id: req.user.id }, { $set: { displayName, avatarUrl } }); });

fixtures.reason: caller-controlled limit with no cap — resource exhaustion (API4:2023)

fixtures.text: app.get('/api/events', async (req, res) => { const limit = Math.min(parseInt(req.query.limit) || 20, 100); res.json(await Event.find().limit(limit)); });
